## Dataset(s) affected

## Checklist

- [ ] Data files are in the correct directory under `data/`
- [ ] `metadata.json` is created or updated
- [ ] `README.md` is created or updated
- [ ] No file exceeds 50 MB (large files go to GitHub Releases)
- [ ] License information is documented
- [ ] `python scripts/validate-metadata.py` passes
